series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, applications and correspondence from parents, students and high school guidance counselors related to this program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain correspondence from applicants and recipients and copies of checks from recipients and institutions in office for 4 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain all applicants, student names, Social Security Numbers and award amounts 4 years. After audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
